problem id: 716998e8
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4)

examples:
  11110100 -> 01000000
  00011001 -> 10010000
  01111001 -> 10010000
  01010010 -> 00100000
  11100011 -> 00110000
  00110111 -> 01110000
  00111100 -> 11000000
  00011101 -> 11010000
  01011101 -> 11010000

query: 10001001
predicted answer: 10010000
